document.docTitle: Cyphostemma kilimandscharicum var. kilimandscharicum Desc. ex Wild & R. B. Drumm. var. kilimandscharicum
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Cyphostemma kilimandscharicum (Gilg) Desc. ex Wild & R.B.Drumm. var. kilimandscharicum —
Habitat: LMWF, LMDF, BZ, UMF; 1 500–3 000 m. Distribution: II.
Voucher: Upper Imenti Forest, Alt. 2 448 m, 7 Aug. 2015, SAJIT 003185 (HIB).
References: Verdcourt (1993), Bussmann (1993, 1994, 2006), Bussmann & Beck (1995a, 1995c, 1999), Agnew (2013).
